hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.sh) chmod +x "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.last_assistant_message' | head -c 100 | osascript -e 'on run' -e 'set msg to do shell script "cat /dev/stdin"' -e 'display notification msg with title "Claude Code"' -e 'end run'
